hero.title: Toolio
hero.subtitle: The all-in-one toolkit for modern teams

squares.heading: Ship Faster
squares.text: Accelerate your workflow with intelligent automation that learns your patterns.

squares.heading: Stay Aligned
squares.text: Real-time collaboration keeps everyone on the same page, no matter where they are.

squares.heading: Scale Smart
squares.text: From startup to enterprise, Toolio grows with your team seamlessly.

squares.heading: Zero Friction
squares.text: Onboard in minutes. No complex setup, no steep learning curve.

squares.heading: Deep Insights
squares.text: Analytics dashboards that surface what matters, not just raw data.

squares.heading: Built to Last
squares.text: Enterprise-grade security and reliability from day one.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need, nothing you don't

squares.heading: Task Boards
squares.text: Drag-and-drop boards with customizable workflows for every team.

squares.heading: Time Tracking
squares.text: Automatic time tracking that runs silently in the background.

squares.heading: Integrations
squares.text: Connect with 200+ tools your team already uses daily.

squares.heading: Templates
squares.text: Pre-built templates for sprints, roadmaps, and retrospectives.

squares.heading: Automations
squares.text: Set rules once and let Toolio handle the repetitive tasks.

squares.heading: API Access
squares.text: Full REST and GraphQL APIs for custom integrations.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to a better workflow

squares.heading: 1. Connect
squares.text: Link your existing tools and import your data in one click.

squares.heading: 2. Configure
squares.text: Set up workflows that match how your team actually works.

squares.heading: 3. Collaborate
squares.text: Start working together with real-time sync across all devices.

squares.heading: 4. Automate
squares.text: Let Toolio learn your patterns and suggest optimizations.

squares.heading: 5. Measure
squares.text: Track progress with automatically generated reports.

squares.heading: 6. Iterate
squares.text: Continuously improve with data-driven retrospectives.

squares.heading: Starter
squares.text: Free for up to 5 users. Includes basic boards and time tracking.

squares.heading: Team
squares.text: $12/user/mo. Unlimited boards, integrations, and automations.

squares.heading: Business
squares.text: $29/user/mo. Advanced analytics, SSO, and priority support.

squares.heading: Enterprise
squares.text: Custom pricing. Dedicated infrastructure and SLA guarantees.

squares.heading: Add-ons
squares.text: Extra storage, advanced reporting, and custom branding available.

squares.heading: Non-Profit
squares.text: 50% discount for qualified non-profit organizations.
